completed_steps.summary: Classified as monorepo with 6 parts: core (library), cli (cli), web (web), plugin-api (library), plugins/20 (library), integration-tests (backend)
Found 140+ existing docs across root, docs/, packages, _bmad-output
Exhaustive source scan: read all 52 core source files, 58 CLI commands, 130+ web components, 20 plugins, 53 API routes
Generated project-overview.md — executive summary, 6 parts, 20 plugins, tech stack, architecture, 1400+ tests
Generated architecture.md — 6 layers, 8 plugin slots, 18-state machine, event system, error handling, security model
Generated api-contracts.md (53 endpoints) and component-inventory.md (130+ components, hooks, accessibility)
Generated source-tree-analysis.md — annotated directory tree of all source files
Generated integration-architecture.md — inter-package deps, plugin loading, event flow, SSE, config, error boundaries
Generated development-guide.md — comprehensive dev guide: setup, build, test, code standards, plugin/CLI/web development
Generated index.md — master documentation index with links to all 15 docs
Validation: all 8 generated docs present, index links verified, no broken references
Workflow finalized. 8 new docs generated, master index created, state file updated.

findings.project_classification: Monorepo (pnpm workspaces), 6 parts, TypeScript ESM, Node 20+
